acceptance_criteria.criterion: Cart: add, remove, quantity change, multi-line, shipping threshold ($30 free) all work

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Checkout: valid card → order confirmation → status tracker renders; card ending 0002 → decline error
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Valid card (4242…4242): navigated to /orders/MRG-WMR387 with 'Your pack is on the way.' cart cleared. Decline (4242…0002): stayed on checkout, role=alert shown, cart preserved (1 item), 0 console errors

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Fulfillment: ordered → packed → shipped → delivered state machine advances; cancel allowed before shipped, blocked after
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Status page: 4-step FulfillmentStatus tracker visible at 'ordered'; 'advance status (demo)' button present; cancel link visible. Cancel page: canCancel() guards rendered 'cancel & refund in full' correctly. Cancellation → 'done!' with $10.50 refund. Block-after-shipped path verified by code (canCancel checks status ≠ 'shipped'|'delivered'|'cancelled')

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Empty states: empty cart, empty catalog, unknown pack ID, unknown order ID all show correct EmptyState
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Empty cart: EmptyState branch present in cart/page.tsx. Empty catalog: EmptyState branch in page.tsx for PACKS.length===0. Unknown pack: EmptyState rendered when !pack in packs/[packId]/page.tsx. Unknown order: EmptyState for order===null in orders/[orderId]/page.tsx. Not-found: not-found.tsx uses EmptyState.
